message:
feat(cli): implement actual curl-based asset download and robust build-dir creation

Replace placeholder download logic and fix build-dir collision potential:

Asset download (assets.rs):
- Replace stub comment ("download not implemented in library") with
  actual curl-based download using `curl -fsSL -o <partial> <url>`
- Propagate curl execution and exit-status errors as io::Error
- Improve error message when partial file is missing post-download

Build directory creation (from_source.rs):
- Replace timestamp-based directory naming (collision-prone under
  concurrent builds) with random-nonce + PID naming scheme using
  rand::random::<u128>()
- Use create_dir() (not create_dir_all()) for atomic collision
  detection via AlreadyExists errors
- Retry up to 32 attempts on collision before failing
- Produce more informative error messages including the attempted path

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
